abilities.name: Holon Veil
abilities.text: Each player's Pokemon that has δ on its card can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Delta Circle
attacks.text: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Pokemon you have in play that has δ on its card.

tests.name: delta_circle_bonus_damage
tests.description: Test that Delta Circle adds +10 per delta Pokemon in play

tests.name: delta_circle_counts_own_pokemon
tests.description: Test that Delta Circle only counts the attacker's delta Pokemon
